notes: README.md is comprehensive (564 lines, 506 insertions). Contains all required sections: (1) Setup instructions - Quick Start section with prerequisites, clone instructions, environment configuration with all necessary variables, Docker Compose setup. (2) Architecture overview - detailed folder structure showing all modules (api/internal with auth, users, admin, ai, analytics, community, documents, gamification, notifications, physical, pyqs, questions, referral, storage, study_plans, subscriptions, syllabus, tests), and domain model (User, Content, Community). (3) API documentation reference - interactive docs mention (Swagger UI, ReDoc), JWT authentication explanation (access/refresh tokens), rate limiting details, health check endpoint. (4) Deployment guide - Docker deployment, environment variables table, Docker services table with ports, resource limits per service, health checks for all services, monitoring section with logs and metrics guidance. All documentation is well-structured with proper headings, tables, and code blocks.
